kaos_elements.name: Efficiency Goal
kaos_elements.description: Efficiency objective for AD: It must execute an MRM to safely pull over or stop in a low-risk zone within a specific time window
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Quality-attribute specific requirement analysis

kaos_elements.name: Efficiency Requirement 1
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure efficiency (latency optimization): It must execute an MRM to safely pull over or stop in a low-risk zone within a specific time window
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for latency optimization

kaos_elements.name: Efficiency Requirement 2
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure efficiency (throughput stability): ODD (Operational Design Domain):
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for throughput stability

kaos_elements.name: Efficiency Requirement 3
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure efficiency (resource utilization): - The system operates in specific urban and highway scenarios
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for resource utilization

kaos_elements.name: Efficiency Requirement 4
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure efficiency (latency optimization): It must continuously monitor ODD compliance and request human takeover (HMI warning) if boundaries are reached
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for latency optimization

kaos_elements.name: Efficiency Requirement 5
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure efficiency (throughput stability): [Efficiency & Planning Requirements - Based on EM Motion Planner]
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for throughput stability

kaos_elements.name: Sustainability Goal
kaos_elements.description: Sustainability objective for AD: - The planner must simultaneously optimize for three conflicting objectives: Safety (collision avoidance), Smoothness (passenger comfort), and Speed (reaching destination)
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Quality-attribute specific requirement analysis

kaos_elements.name: Sustainability Requirement 1
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure sustainability (energy footprint reduction): - The planner must simultaneously optimize for three conflicting objectives: Safety (collision avoidance), Smoothness (passenger comfort), and Speed (reaching destination)
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for energy footprint reduction

kaos_elements.name: Sustainability Requirement 2
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure sustainability (resource lifecycle control): Path-Speed Decoupling (EM Framework):
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for resource lifecycle control

kaos_elements.name: Sustainability Requirement 3
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure sustainability (environmental impact awareness): - The system must use the Expectation-Maximization (EM) framework
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for environmental impact awareness

kaos_elements.name: Sustainability Requirement 4
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure sustainability (energy footprint reduction): - Step 1 (E-step): Generate an optimal path in the Frenet Frame (SL-Graph)
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for energy footprint reduction

kaos_elements.name: Sustainability Requirement 5
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure sustainability (resource lifecycle control): - Step 2 (M-step): Generate an optimal speed profile in the Station-Time Frame (ST-Graph)
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for resource lifecycle control

kaos_elements.name: Sustainability Requirement 6
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure sustainability (environmental impact awareness): Hard Constraints (Mathematical):
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for environmental impact awareness

kaos_elements.name: Sustainability Requirement 7
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure sustainability (energy footprint reduction): - Trajectory smoothness is critical
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for energy footprint reduction

steps.analysis_text: The requirements for both sustainability and trustworthiness are aligned towards ensuring safety and passenger comfort in the autonomous driving system. However, conflicting objectives may arise particularly around the optimization of speed versus trajectory smoothness. The focus on minimizing jerk for passenger comfort may impede the system's ability to reach destinations quickly, thus creating a tension between speed and smoothness.
steps.analysis: The requirements for both sustainability and trustworthiness are aligned towards ensuring safety and passenger comfort in the autonomous driving system. However, conflicting objectives may arise particularly around the optimization of speed versus trajectory smoothness. The focus on minimizing jerk for passenger comfort may impede the system's ability to reach destinations quickly, thus creating a tension between speed and smoothness.
steps.feedback: It is essential to establish a clear prioritization framework to balance the conflicting objectives of safety, smoothness, and speed. Further discussions are needed to determine acceptable trade-offs and performance metrics that can guide the planning and control module effectively.

steps.analysis_text: The negotiation between the GreenAgent and TrustworthinessAgent reveals several overlapping requirements regarding trajectory smoothness, energy footprint reduction, and safety metrics. Both agents prioritize smoothness for passenger comfort, but they also focus on different aspects, such as sustainability (GreenAgent) and security (TrustworthinessAgent).
steps.analysis: The negotiation between the GreenAgent and TrustworthinessAgent reveals several overlapping requirements regarding trajectory smoothness, energy footprint reduction, and safety metrics. Both agents prioritize smoothness for passenger comfort, but they also focus on different aspects, such as sustainability (GreenAgent) and security (TrustworthinessAgent).
steps.feedback: It is essential to balance the conflicting objectives of sustainability and trustworthiness. The agents should collaborate to ensure that trajectory smoothness does not compromise safety or resource efficiency.

kaos_elements.name: Trustworthiness Goal
kaos_elements.description: Trustworthiness objective for AD: - Trajectory smoothness is critical
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Quality-attribute specific requirement analysis

kaos_elements.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 1
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (security assurance): - Trajectory smoothness is critical
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for security assurance

kaos_elements.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 2
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (auditability): The system must minimize "Jerk" (rate of change of acceleration) to ensure passenger comfort
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for auditability

kaos_elements.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 3
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (integrity guarantees): - Curvature constraints ($kappa$) must be satisfied to prevent rollover or tire slip
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for integrity guarantees

kaos_elements.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 4
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (security assurance): - Non-convex obstacle constraints must be handled using iterative quadratic programming (QP)
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for security assurance

kaos_elements.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 5
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (auditability): [Conflict Scenario for Negotiation]
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for auditability

kaos_elements.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 6
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (integrity guarantees): - The SafetyAgent prioritizes "Passive Safety" and strictly enforcing safe distances and MRM execution
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for integrity guarantees

kaos_elements.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 7
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (security assurance): - The EfficiencyAgent prioritizes "Smoothness" and "Speed" using the QP function to minimize Jerk
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for security assurance

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Goal
kaos_elements.description: Responsibility objective for AD: - The EfficiencyAgent prioritizes "Smoothness" and "Speed" using the QP function to minimize Jerk
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Quality-attribute specific requirement analysis

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 1
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (regulatory accountability): - The EfficiencyAgent prioritizes "Smoothness" and "Speed" using the QP function to minimize Jerk
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for regulatory accountability

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 2
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (stakeholder transparency): - **Potential Conflict**: An emergency MRM (Safety) triggered by a fault might violate the Jerk/Smoothness constraints (Efficiency), requiring architectural negotiation (e
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for stakeholder transparency

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 3
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (ethical compliance): , relaxing smoothness constraints during MRM)
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for ethical compliance

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 4
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (regulatory accountability): Project: Baidu Apollo Autonomous Driving System (Planning & Control Module)
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for regulatory accountability

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 5
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (stakeholder transparency): The system is a Level 4 autonomous driving platform operating in mixed traffic environments
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for stakeholder transparency

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 6
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (ethical compliance): It must strictly adhere to the "Apollo Pilot Safety Report" and the "EM Motion Planner" specifications
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for ethical compliance
